pyqgis_plugin.name: MapThemeToolbox
pyqgis_plugin.description: Map Theme toolbox: Modify, Repair, Present themes, Sync and Auto-Save
pyqgis_plugin.about: A combined toolbar for managing QGIS Map Themes: modify mutual layer visibility across themes, repair broken layer paths, present themes with a single click, sync with Excel/CSV/GeoPackage, and auto-save the project on a timer. Compatible with QGIS 3.22+ and QGIS 4.x.

pyqgis_plugin.name: RORB Tools
pyqgis_plugin.description: RORB catchment preparation, control vector builder, and results viewer.
pyqgis_plugin.about: A combined RORB toolbox with three toolbar icons: (1) Create RORB Layers — layer templates; (2) Build RORB .catg — auto-name, check links, build RORB/URBS control vectors; (3) RORB Results Viewer — browse .out files, plot hydrographs, export critical events. Requires pyromb>=0.3 for build tools.
